summary: Full-stack ANAM MMA test - first iteration. Backend: 38/38 pytest cases PASS (auth, waiver, RBAC, settings, plans/subscriptions/payments + receipts, freeze/resume, schedule, bookings + dup-rejection, coach roster + checkin, guest booking public, public class, private sessions confirm flow, announcements -> notifications, admin dashboard, members/payments CSV exports, class cancel-date notifies). Frontend mobile (390x844): admin login -> Command Center dashboard with stat cards + Today's classes + Roster btn works; Timetable date tape (14 days) + class cards render; Member registration -> Waiver screen -> Accept -> Home with hero card 'Book your next class'; Timetable booking flow shows 'Booked!' toast + 'BOOKED' badge + capacity bar updates 1/16; Profile shows membership, payment history, GDPR delete button, logout; Coach login -> /coach screen with 'My Classes Today', Private Session Requests (CONFIRMED status from API test visible), Full Timetable Today with CHECK-IN button. No red screens. Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' (RN deprecation, non-blocking). Expo packaging shows minor version mismatch: react-native-keyboard-controller@1.18.6 vs expected 1.18.5.

react_native_issues.issue: Installed version 1.18.6 doesn't match Expo expected 1.18.5 (warning at metro startup). Run `npx expo install --check` to align. Reference: /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log
Browser console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Search for `pointerEvents={...}` usages in components and migrate to `style={{ pointerEvents: ... }}`.

action_items: (Optional) Align react-native-keyboard-controller to 1.18.5 via `npx expo install --check` to silence Expo doctor warning.
(Optional) Migrate deprecated `pointerEvents` JSX prop usage to `style.pointerEvents` to clear console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1055 lines - approaching the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers (auth, plans, bookings, admin, classes) for maintainability.
schedule_for_date issues per-class find_one for class_overrides inside a loop - N+1 query. For larger schedules, batch fetch all overrides for the date in a single query.

promote_admin doesn't prevent the seeded admin from being demoted via update_user role change, but seed re-creates admin on startup only if email missing. Self-demotion (admin removing own role) could lock out org - consider guard.

Booking cancellation by member uses settings cancellation_window_hours but reads start_time as UTC; if club is in Europe/Dublin timezone, the cancellation window may misfire around DST. Currently fine for testing - tests passed because dates were future-dated.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows (admin dashboard, member register+waiver+booking+profile, coach My Classes)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ Plan, several TEST member accounts (uitest_*, test_*, cxlt_*), one subscription + payment, one private session request (confirmed), one announcement 'TEST Announce', a few bookings - all flagged with TEST_/test_ prefixes for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend covers all features mentioned in problem statement and is stable. Use existing /app/backend/tests/test_anam_mma_api.py for regression. Frontend critical flows verified at viewport 390x844. testIDs are well-distributed across screens (login-*, register-*, waiver-*, book-btn-*, date-*, bookings-tab-*, filter-*, gdpr-delete-button, approve-member-button, etc.). Bookings inner tab chips (bookings-tab-*) didn't render in current state - may only appear when there's data; not a defect.
rca_of_issue: No bugs to report. All critical paths green.
